creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 225747
git diff for devel/tclcheck

The git diff attached fixes a build error I
recently encountered, removes the patch embeded
within the port Makefile, as doing it this way
proves to be too brittle. Squashes a WARN and
moves the source to GitLab. All told warrants
a version bump.

That's it!

builds, tests, works AOK on 12 and 13 amd64.

Thanks!

--Chris
